caption: A man with short, grey-streaked hair and stubble is seated in a recording studio, positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. He wears black over-ear headphones and a black t-shirt over a grey undergarment. The background consists of dark, textured acoustic foam panels with a ribbed pattern. As the sequence progresses, the man maintains a steady gaze while slightly shifting his facial expression and head position. In the final stages, he begins to raise his right hand, bringing his fingers into view on the right side of the screen. Throughout the clip, the equipment and setting remain static, focusing on the man's upper body and his interactions within the recording environment. There is no on-screen text or logos visible.
